description: Proof DAG registry index for the local-Langlands-after-Fargues–Scholze program.

2102.13459.title: Geometrization of the local Langlands correspondence
2102.13459.note: SHARED node — the per-paper DAG lives in the perfectoid-spaces registry (perfectoid-spaces/papers/2102.13459.json). Here it is the root/hub; downstream papers attach to thm:I.10.1 (FS correspondence), thm:I.8.1 (moduli of L-parameters), thm:I.6.3 (dual group via geometric Satake).

2503.00621.title: Endoscopic decomposition of elliptic Fargues-Scholze L-packets
2503.00621.note: First extracted member. 3 cross-DAG edges into the shared FS node (depends_on thm:I.10.1, depends_on thm:I.8.1, imports_result thm:I.7.2).

2109.01210.title: Compatibility of the Fargues-Scholze and Gan-Takeda Local Langlands
2109.01210.note: Verification member. 4 cross-DAG edges importing FS results (thm:I.10.1 parametrization, thm:I.9.6 properties, thm:I.7.2 Hecke, thm:I.8.1 spectral action).

2504.13869.title: On the categorical local Langlands conjectures for depth-zero regular supercuspidal representations
2504.13869.note: Categorical-probe member. 2 cross-DAG edges (imports_result thm:I.8.1 spectral action; depends_on thm:I.10.1 — verifies the categorical form of the FS correspondence for depth-zero TRSELP).

2505.10724.title: Categorical local Langlands and torsion classes of some Shimura varieties
2505.10724.note: Categorify/apply member. 3 cross-DAG edges (imports_result thm:III.0.2 Bun_G structure, imports_result thm:I.9.6 correspondence properties, depends_on thm:I.10.1 Hecke eigensheaf). Applies the categorical FS decomposition to Shimura/RZ cohomology.

2501.07944.title: Geometrization of the local Langlands correspondence, motivically
2501.07944.note: Extend member (by Scholze). 2 cross-DAG edges (extends thm:I.10.1, extends thm:I.7.2): a motivic refinement of FS proving the independence-of-$\ell$ conjecture (FS Conjecture I.9.5).
